fields.summary: Adding domain parameter support to trans tag (parse, _make_node, _install_callables)

content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: domain feature done: added domain parsing in parse() loop (string-literal validation, duplicate check), domain param (keyword, has default=None) in _make_node() generating dgettext/dngettext calls, plus dgettext/dngettext wiring in _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall and GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS. I call _make_node(..., domain=domain) as a keyword arg specifically so it won't collide with your metadata positional slot -- suggest you also pass your param as a keyword (metadata=metadata) for a cleaner merge.

fields.summary: domain feature done: added domain parsing in parse() loop (string-literal validation, duplicate check), domain param (keyword, has default=None) in _make_node() generating dgettext/dngettext calls, plus dgettext/dngettext wiring in _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall and GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS. I call _make_node(..., domain=domain) as a keyword arg specifically so it won't collide with your metadata positional slot -- suggest you also pass your param as a keyword (metadata=metadata) for a cleaner merge.
